prompt: Which courses are prerequisites for the most other courses?

inputData.question: Which courses are prerequisites for the most other courses?

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Which courses are prerequisites for the most other courses?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Which courses are prerequisites for the most other courses?"},"startedAt":1771855691717,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The question asks which courses are prerequisites for the most other courses. This requires counting how many courses have each course as a prerequisite. The `prerequisites` table has `prerequisite_course_id` (the course that is a prerequisite) and `course_id` (the course that requires it). I need to group by `prerequisite_course_id`, count the number of courses that depend on it, join with the `courses` table to get course details, and order by count descending.","sql":"
SELECT 
  c.id,
  c.code,
  c.name,
  COUNT(p.course_id) AS num_courses_requiring_this_prerequisite
FROM courses c
INNER JOIN prerequisites p ON c.id = p.prerequisite_course_id
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY num_courses_requiring_this_prerequisite DESC
","assumptions":["The prerequisites table stores prerequisite relationships where prerequisite_course_id is the course that serves as a prerequisite and course_id is the course that requires it","We want to find courses that appear most frequently as prerequisites for other courses"]},"endedAt":1771855714607},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"
SELECT 
  c.id,
  c.code,
  c.name,
  COUNT(p.course_id) AS num_courses_requiring_this_prerequisite
FROM courses c
INNER JOIN prerequisites p ON c.id = p.prerequisite_course_id
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY num_courses_requiring_this_prerequisite DESC
"},"startedAt":1771855714614,"status":"success","output":{"ok":true,"sql":"SELECT 
  c.id,

FROM courses c
INNER JOIN prerequisites p ON c.id = p.prerequisite_course_id
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY num_courses_requiring_this_prerequisite visualization.title: Courses by Number of Dependent Courses (Prerequisites)

x.title: Number of Courses Requiring This as Prerequisite

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  c.id,
  c.code,
  c.name,
  COUNT(p.course_id) AS num_courses_requiring_this_prerequisite
FROM courses c
INNER JOIN prerequisites p ON c.id = p.prerequisite_course_id
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY num_courses_requiring_this_prerequisite DESC
